content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886 •

March 26, 2001


Mona Patel
Brown & Wood, LLP
555 California Street
San Francisco, CA 94104-1715

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-01-049

Dear Ms. Patel:

This letter confirms your telephone message left for me on March 20, 2001, notifying me that you have withdrawn your request for advice, dated March 5, 2001.

Please do not hesitate to contact our office if you have any other questions regarding this matter or decide that you require formal advice¹ relating to the Political Reform Act.


Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: C. Scott Tocher
Staff Counsel, Legal Division

CST:jg
I:\AdviceLetrs\01-049

¹ Formal written advice confers immunity on the person requesting the advice under Section 83114(b) and Regulation 18329(b)(7), enclosed. Informal assistance, which includes phone advice and guidance from advice letters written to others, does not provide such immunity. (Regulation 18329(c)(3).)

sections.question_synthetic: Not applicable - this is a withdrawal of a previous advice request.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC acknowledges the withdrawal of the requestor's advice letter request dated March 5, 2001.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Withdrawal letter with no question or conclusion sections. Document confirms telephone notification of withdrawal received March 20, 2001. File reference W-01-049.

QUESTION: Not applicable - this is a withdrawal of a previous advice request.

CONCLUSION: The FPPC acknowledges the withdrawal of the requestor's advice letter request dated March 5, 2001.
